subcodes.first_line: O Siyyid-i-Ahrar! As thou art the embodiment of the love of the Abhá Beauty and art associated with the sacred threshold of the Almighty, thou art verily the chieftain of the free [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سید احرار چون مظهر محبت جمال ابهائی و منتسب آستان کبریا سید احراری و سرور
